rules.scope_rule: Read access is limited to records intersecting the actor's effective organization, contract, property, block, or assigned work scope.
rules.record_state_rule: Current and historical versions are visible; sensitivity filters may redact personnel or commercial fields.
rules.delegation_rule: Read delegation may widen managed scope only through an attributable, time-bounded assignment.
rules.denial_copy: This record is outside your effective organization, contract, or delegated scope.
rules.effective_time_rule: Role assignment, delegation, contract, and managed scope must all be effective when the action occurs.

rules.scope_rule: The actor must own the exact transition or hold an explicit effective assignment for the affected operational scope.
rules.record_state_rule: The current server state and source record versions must match the exact transition precondition.
rules.delegation_rule: Delegation is evaluated per transition grant and never inferred from broad workflow visibility or edit access.
rules.denial_copy: The exact transition grant, current state, effective scope, or required evidence did not resolve; request accountable review.

rules.effective_time_rule: Role assignment, delegation, contract, and managed scope must all be effective when the action occurs.

rules.scope_rule: The actor must own the exact transition or hold an explicit effective assignment for the affected operational scope.
rules.record_state_rule: The accepted action creates an attributable successor and preserves reciprocal predecessor lineage.
rules.delegation_rule: Delegation is evaluated per transition grant and never inferred from broad workflow visibility or edit access.
rules.denial_copy: The exact transition grant, current state, effective scope, or required evidence did not resolve; request accountable review.
rules.effective_time_rule: Role assignment, delegation, contract, and managed scope must all be effective when the action occurs.

rules.scope_rule: This fallback applies whenever no exact allow grant resolves every contextual authorization dimension.
rules.record_state_rule: Unknown, stale, conflicting, superseded, or out-of-sequence state prevents consequential mutation.
rules.delegation_rule: No inferred, expired, transitive, or cross-organization delegation can override default denial.
rules.denial_copy: Action denied by default because one or more authority, scope, state, delegation, sensitivity, or time conditions did not resolve.
rules.effective_time_rule: Role assignment, delegation, contract, and managed scope must all be effective when the action occurs.
